hooks.command: cd /workspaces/trading-agent || exit 0; PUSHED=0; if ! git diff --quiet HEAD -- dashboard.html dashboard-data.json; then git add -- dashboard.html dashboard-data.json >/dev/null 2>&1; if git commit -m 'Auto-deploy dashboard updates' -- dashboard.html dashboard-data.json >/dev/null 2>&1; then PUSHED=1; fi; fi; if [ "$PUSHED" = "1" ]; then if git push >/dev/null 2>&1; then printf '{"systemMessage":"Auto-pushed dashboard updates to GitHub Pages."}'; else printf '{"systemMessage":"Dashboard committed locally — push failed (network?). Will retry on next turn."}'; fi; fi; exit 0
